infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysAndWhenInUseUsageDescrip: FleetOn needs location access to track trips in real-time, even when the app is in the background.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: FleetOn needs location access to track your current trip.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: FleetOn needs microphone access to record voice messages for dispatchers.
infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: FleetOn needs camera access to capture odometer readings.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: FleetOn needs photo access to save odometer photos.
infoPlist.NSLocationAlwaysUsageDescription: FleetOn needs background location to track trips continuously.

plugins.locationAlwaysAndWhenInUsePermission: Allow FleetOn to use your location to track trips.

plugins.cameraPermission: FleetOn needs camera access to capture odometer readings.
plugins.microphonePermission: FleetOn needs microphone for voice messages.
